nasb.text: My heavenly Father will also do the same to you, if each of you does not forgive his brother from your heart.”

esv.text: So also my heavenly Father will do to every one of you, if you do not forgive your brother from your heart.”

cnv.text: 如果你們各人不從心裡饒恕你的弟兄，我的天父也必這樣待你們。”

ccb.text: 如果你们不从心里饶恕自己的弟兄，我的天父也要这样对待你们。”

csbs.text: 如果你们每个人不从心里饶恕自己的弟兄，我的天父也会照样对待你们。”
